abilities.description: Investigate, then target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each Clue you control. (To investigate, create a colorless Clue artifact token with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

effect.description: Investigate, then target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each Clue you control. (To investigate, create a colorless Clue artifact token with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")
effect.name: Investigate
